rationale: Educ. Code §31.102 governs title, custody, and purchasing of instructional materials by school districts. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Each instructional material purchased as provided by this chapter for a school district or an open-enrollment charter school is the property of the district or school.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this instructional materials statute.
